X^30 - X^29*Y + 714*X^29 + 29*X^28*Y + 175653*X^28 - 319*X^27*Y + 16216684*X^27 + 1421*X^26*Y + 
    340795182*X^26 + 580*X^25*Y + 3339922344*X^25 - 26680*X^24*Y + 18681529256*X^24 + 53679*X^23*Y + 
    65190964932*X^23 + 189399*X^22*Y + 145746939921*X^22 - 622398*X^21*Y + 193096339978*X^21 - 
    853818*X^20*Y + 79225176183*X^20 + 3427365*X^19*Y - 213842083608*X^19 + 3592085*X^18*Y - 
    434696047201*X^18 - 10954634*X^17*Y - 278856446718*X^17 - 14041394*X^16*Y + 154093039581*X^16 + 
    18871083*X^15*Y + 391233115204*X^15 + 37142939*X^14*Y + 212930064261*X^14 - 9216142*X^13*Y - 
    78041237118*X^13 - 54103270*X^12*Y - 159006324329*X^12 - 19207947*X^11*Y - 71430269112*X^11 + 
    38397537*X^10*Y + 10575486927*X^10 + 31795426*X^9*Y + 31231369098*X^9 - 9708910*X^8*Y + 
    17209092681*X^8 - 19103721*X^7*Y + 1339615908*X^7 - 2357613*X^6*Y - 3310173216*X^6 + 
    5229135*X^5*Y - 2067026040*X^5 + 1754181*X^4*Y - 591595650*X^4 - 570024*X^3*Y + 73993500*X^3 -
